'''Far Cry''' were a [[dusk]] [[Band/Legends|band]] from [[Tuttin IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Its members included [[Erik Lauderslag]], [[Ryley Ancum]], [[Hannis D'lund]], [[Teki D'lund]], and, for a time, [[Onjo Fegel]].<ref name="GC6" />
